Arbitrage bot can only be installed and configured by your personal analyst

Our goal is to let everyone work freely with the best conditions. See for yourself! Join E – Virtual

Arbitrage bot

Vex Group offers users to use bot for automated trading. Only our expert can launch and set it up. 

Open AI is integrated into our bot. It is thanks to artificial intelligence that more data is processed at a higher speed, and the calculations become faster and more accurate. It is completely autonomous and adaptive to various conditions and factors. Make sure the future is already here.

We pay special attention to our clients

Vex Group is aware of your needs, and does everything to meet them. Your goals and objectives are above all for us, regardless of the size of your capital or type of account. All our clients receive the same quality offers.
Open an account

Forex

Conquer the market with the largest capitalization, trade major and minor currencies

Stocks

Gather shares of global giants that are well known everywhere, like Amazon, Apple, Tesla, and Facebook

Indexes

Invest in profitable stock indexes from technology corporations that drive the economy

Commodities

Work with products like, energy resources and agricultural commodities

Our Benefits

  • Advanced accounts and secure withdrawals
  • Training materials, analytics, trading signals and more
  • Built-in indicators, multiple timeframes and charts
  • Advanced terminal with super-fast execution of orders
  • Tight spreads and minimal commissions, easy to work with
  • Protection against negative balance, cashback and other programs

You will reach your goals with an advanced broker.

Vex Group has a set of tools to help you research and study the markets and analyze assets. Use all of our features to get to know your commodities better and work more efficiently in any situation.

Advanced Terminal for your Needs

The well-known WebTrader trading platform stands out for its feature set and high speed. Instant order execution is suitable for scalping strategies, while the terminal’s easy setup and management allow beginners and advanced users alike to get the most out of it.

Improve Yourselves with our Help

We pay special attention to education, helping our clients learn a lot about the markets. We have materials at different levels so that both beginners and professional users can learn something new. In addition to training manuals, Vex Group has a team of professionals (experienced analysts, crisis managers and many others). You can ask for a consultation so that the experts can guide you to successful solutions.

Customer Reviews

I like Vex Group for its great platform. There are plenty of settings available, and I can customize everything according to my strategy. Also, there is analytics on the website, which helps with trading.
Richard Wood
I have no complaints about the broker. Orders are executed quickly. There are no problems with withdrawals. You can work with Vex Group.
Tomasz Prochazka
I trade with an arbitrage bot and am very satisfied with this system. At first, I had doubts, but now I am happy with my choice. The managers at Vex Group quickly set everything up and explained in detail what to do.
Zofia Nowak
Vex Group has excellent specialists. Support responds quickly and they always help with any problem.
Manole Vangeli
I was referred to Vex Group by a friend. Initially, I doubted that you could earn on trading, but it turned out to be quite the opposite. I've already earned something and withdrawn money. Sometimes I consult with my manager, and he helps me trade. I'm very glad I registered with Vex Group. I definitely recommend it to everyone!
Daniel Carvalho
The broker has excellent analytics and other conditions are top-notch. This is not my first broker, but Vex Group managed to grab my attention. Here I found everything I was looking for in a broker: a good platform, tight spreads, and leverage. I'll be happy to continue trading here.
Pablo Torrijos

Beware of scammers. You may receive a phone call claiming to be on our behalf. Your Analyst will need to know your security code.
